title: Crunchy Dutch Milk Stir-fry
description: This spicy and crunchy dutch dish features semi-skimmed milk in a low-sodium friendly recipe that satisfies midnight cravings.
instructions: Soak green peppers in water for about 30 minutes.
Prepare a marinade with low-sodium soy sauce and spices. Mix well and marinate chicken breasts for at least an hour.
Slice chicken into strips, green peppers, onion, and garlic finely.
Heat sesame seeds in a pan over medium heat until they start to turn golden brown.
Add sliced vegetables and cook until soft but not mushy.
Drain soy sauce marinade from chicken and mix cornstarch with 2 tbsp water. Add back to the marinated chicken, toss well and simmer for about 5 minutes.
Combine stir-fried vegetables, crunchy chicken mixture, and toasted sesame seeds in a bowl. Serve immediately.
Enjoy your deliciously spicy and crunchy Dutch Milk Stir-fry!
